title: ICMR BMHRC Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 16 Professor, Assistant Professor and Other Posts
description: Bhopal Memorial Hospital and Research Centre (ICMR BMHRC) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the 16  Professor, Associate Professor, and Assistant Professor Jobs. Candidates with an MBBS Post Graduation can grab this chance and apply for the ICMR BMHRC Notification 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested candidates can apply before the last date of appl...
